description.en: The time and date of the last modification to the archive member. This is a tuple of six values representing the “last [modified] file time” and “last [modified] file date” fields from the ZIP file’s central directory. The tuple contains: Index Value 0 Year (>= 1980) 1 Month (one-based) 2 Day of month (one-based) 3 Hours (zero-based) 4 Minutes (zero-based) 5 Seconds (zero-based) Note The ZIP format supports multiple timestamp fields in different locations (central directory, extra fields for ...

description.en: The level of debug output to use. This may be set from 0 (the default, no output) to 3 (the most output). Debugging information is written to sys.stdout.

info.excerpt: The level of debug output to use. This may be set from 0 (the default, no output) to 3 (the most output). Debugging information is written to sys.stdout.
